chat.author: Mohamed Boucadair

chat.author: Giuseppe Fioccola
chat.text: @Greg White here is the draft I was referring to: https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/draft-ietf-ippm-on-path-active-measurements/

chat.author: Thomas Graf
chat.text: @med, I have been checking IETF liaison statements on ITU-T G.7710 but I haven't found any. Would it make sense to reach out to the CCAMP chairs and send a liaison request together out?

chat.author: Mohamed Boucadair
chat.text: this can be in // of whatever decision to make here

chat.author: Thomas Graf
chat.text: just as a reminder, please take a few minutes and review the proposed joint charter if you haven't done so and feedback on the proposed working group name if you haven't joined yesterday here: https://mailarchive.ietf.org/arch/msg/ippm/GijOfhmdLPis0ZR5Vy-0Zf1I5MA/

chat.author: Boris Khasanov
chat.text: I would like to  remind that just now  the BoF  for Agent Protocols is going on. IMO those AI agents related benchmarking methodologies will require the coordination with  that new WG (if it  will be formed).
